playbook.intent: Allocation snapshot -> rebalanced plan with named moves applied before the next week starts.
playbook.scope: PM holds the resource picture for 3-15 people across multiple engagements (P4) or streams (P6). This playbook runs a single weekly 30-minute review: ingest current load, flag overloads + under-utilization, decide reallocations, and update the system of record. Done when next-week plan reflects the changes and affected people know.

success-criteria.criterion: Zero individuals shown >100% allocated for next week
All under-50% utilized capacity has a named pickup or a reason logged
Allocation tool reflects all moves before the meeting ends
Affected people pinged within 1 hour of the review

stage.name: Snapshot

tasks.task: Pull next-week allocation from tracker (Jira / Float / sheet)
Note any role conflicts (one person on two crit-path tasks)

stage.decision-gate: Advance once flags are visible and the picture matches reality.

stage.name: Decide

tasks.task: For each overload: drop / defer / reassign / accept-overtime
For each idle capacity: pull-forward / pickup billable / training
Update the RACI for anything moved

outputs.output: List of moves with owners + reasons

stage.decision-gate: Advance when no flag remains unresolved or each remaining flag has a written reason.

stage.name: Apply
stage.intent: Make the moves stick in the system.

tasks.task: Update tracker entries before leaving the meeting
Adjust project plans where dependencies shift
Log allocation deltas vs original plan

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when tracker is consistent; do not rely on memory.

stage.name: Communicate
stage.intent: People affected hear it from the PM, not the calendar.

tasks.task: DM each person about their change with the reason
Note client-facing changes for next sync

outputs.output: Personal pings sent; PMO note posted

stage.decision-gate: Done when each affected person has acknowledged.

stage.name: Log
stage.intent: Build the historical trend so next-quarter forecasts are calibrated.

tasks.task: Append this week's metrics to the allocation log
Flag structural issues for the next capacity-planning cycle

stage.decision-gate: Done when log shows this week's snapshot and any pattern flagged for follow-up.

extra.value: ['Reviewing only overloads, missing idle capacity -> billable leak', Forgetting to update the tracker -> next week the same flags reappear, 'Skipping the per-person DM -> people feel reshuffled, not informed']
['Does the next-week view show zero red flags?', 'Did the people moved hear it from me before the calendar told them?', 'Was the log updated so we can spot patterns over a quarter?']

{human: faion get-content run-a-30-minute-resource-allocation-review --format md, agent: faion get-content run-a-30-minute-resource-allocation-review --format context, json: faion get-content run-a-30-minute-resource-allocation-review --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
